creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Committed, with a few small modifications. Just removed a few 
unnecessary :MDOCS/MEXAMPLES checks in post-install to avoid 
unnecessary bsd.port.options.mk inclusion, marked the stuff 
in EXAMPLESDIR as PORTEXAMPLES, and avoided dirrmtry'ing some 
unnecessary directories.
